moments.title: Wimbledon 2026 Heats Up
moments.blurb: The Wimbledon Championships continue at the All England Club, with today featuring the Gentlemen's and Ladies' Singles Third Round and the start of the Junior Championships, building towards the finals on July 12th.

angles.name: Centre Court Buzz
angles.copy: Centre Court is buzzing! Day 6 of Wimbledon sees the singles draw narrow, and the next generation of tennis stars hit the grass for the Junior Championships. Who's your pick for the title?

angles.name: London Tennis Fever
angles.copy: London is gripped by tennis fever! Wimbledon's third round action is in full swing today, setting up some epic clashes. Are you watching from Henman Hill or your sofa?

moments.title: British Grand Prix Sprint & Qualifying Day
moments.blurb: The Formula 1 Pirelli British Grand Prix is underway at Silverstone, with today's schedule featuring the Sprint race and qualifying sessions ahead of Sunday's main Grand Prix.

angles.name: Silverstone Sprint
angles.copy: Engines roaring at Silverstone! It's Sprint and Qualifying day at the British Grand Prix. Who's got the pace to grab pole for tomorrow's big race?

angles.name: F1 Weekend Kicks Off
angles.copy: The British Grand Prix weekend is in full swing! Today, we're getting a double dose of action with the F1 Sprint and then Qualifying. Get ready for some high-speed drama.

moments.title: Love Supreme Jazz Festival Nears Climax
moments.blurb: The Love Supreme Jazz Festival continues in Glynde Place, East Sussex, with its final day tomorrow featuring world-class jazz, soul, funk, and R&B artists.

source.l: Love Supreme Jazz Festival Official Site

angles.name: Last Day of Jazz
angles.copy: It's the final day of Love Supreme Jazz Festival tomorrow! Who are you hoping to catch before the music fades out in Glynde Place?

angles.name: Soulful Sunday
angles.copy: Get ready for a soulful Sunday! The Love Supreme Jazz Festival wraps up tomorrow, promising more incredible live music. What's been your highlight so far?

moments.title: Guilfest 2026 Wraps Up
moments.blurb: Guilfest 2026 concludes tomorrow in Guildford, having featured a diverse lineup including Sophie Ellis-Bextor, Rudimental (DJ set), and The Lottery Winners.

angles.name: Guilfest Finale
angles.copy: Guilfest hits its grand finale tomorrow! Who's had the best set this weekend in Guildford? Let us know!

angles.name: Last Chance for Guilfest
angles.copy: Your last chance to catch the action at Guilfest is tomorrow! From Sophie Ellis-Bextor to Rudimental, it's been a massive weekend of music.

moments.title: Lytham Festival's Last Day
moments.blurb: TK Maxx presents Lytham Festival finishes tomorrow on Lytham Green, having hosted a week of major artists.

angles.name: Lytham Festival Farewell
angles.copy: Lytham Festival wraps up tomorrow! What's been your favourite moment from this year's incredible lineup on Lytham Green?

angles.name: North West Festival Vibes
angles.copy: It's the final day of Lytham Festival tomorrow! If you're heading to Lytham Green, who are you most excited to see?

moments.title: Copa América 2026 Underway
moments.blurb: The Copa América 2026, featuring top South American national teams and invited nations, is currently being hosted in the United States, Canada, and Mexico.

angles.name: Copa América Action
angles.copy: The Copa América is delivering some incredible football! Who are you backing to lift the trophy this year?

angles.name: North American Showdown
angles.copy: Football fans, don't miss the ongoing Copa América! The continent's best are battling it out in the US, Canada, and Mexico.

moments.title: New UK Singles Chart Revealed
moments.blurb: The Official UK Singles Chart for the week ending July 8, 2026, was revealed yesterday, with Sam Fender & Olivia Dean's 'Rein Me In' holding the top spot.

angles.name: Chart Toppers
angles.copy: New UK Singles Chart out now! Congratulations to Sam Fender & Olivia Dean for 'Rein Me In' staying at Number 1. What's your favourite from the Top 40?

angles.name: New Music Friday Recap
angles.copy: Did your favourite make the cut? The new Official UK Singles Chart is here, with Olivia Rodrigo, Harry Styles, and even Michael Jackson in the Top 10!

moments.title: Ringo Starr Turns 86
moments.blurb: Legendary Beatles drummer Ringo Starr celebrates his 86th birthday on July 7, 2026.

angles.name: Happy Birthday Ringo
angles.copy: Sending big birthday wishes to the one and only Ringo Starr, who turns 86 on July 7th! What's your favourite Beatles track featuring Ringo on drums?

angles.name: Beatles Legend
angles.copy: On July 7th, we celebrate the 86th birthday of music icon Ringo Starr. The drumming legend who helped shape a generation. Peace and Love!

moments.title: Kaleidoscope Festival Returns to Ally Pally
moments.blurb: Kaleidoscope Festival is back at Alexandra Palace in London on July 11th, promising a day of music, comedy, and arts.

angles.name: Ally Pally Festival
angles.copy: Kaleidoscope Festival lights up Alexandra Palace next Saturday, July 11th! Who's joining us for a day of music, comedy, and incredible views?

angles.name: London Calling
angles.copy: London, get ready for Kaleidoscope Festival next weekend, July 11th! It's shaping up to be a fantastic day out at Ally Pally.

moments.title: Suzanne Vega Celebrates 67th Birthday
moments.blurb: Singer-songwriter Suzanne Vega, known for hits like 'Luka' and 'Tom's Diner', turns 67 on July 11, 2026.

angles.name: Happy Birthday Suzanne
angles.copy: Happy 67th Birthday to the iconic Suzanne Vega on July 11th! Which of her timeless tracks is your all-time favourite?

angles.name: Tom's Diner Legend
angles.copy: On July 11th, we celebrate Suzanne Vega's 67th birthday. Her distinctive voice and storytelling have captivated us for decades!

moments.title: Richie Sambora Turns 67
moments.blurb: Former Bon Jovi guitarist and songwriter Richie Sambora celebrates his 67th birthday on July 11, 2026.

angles.name: Rock Star Birthday
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 67th Birthday to rock legend Richie Sambora on July 11th! What's your favourite Bon Jovi guitar riff?

angles.name: Bon Jovi Icon
angles.copy: On July 11th, we're celebrating Richie Sambora's 67th birthday. The man behind some of Bon Jovi's biggest anthems!

moments.title: Peter Murphy Celebrates 69th Birthday
moments.blurb: Bauhaus frontman Peter Murphy, known as the 'Godfather of Goth', turns 69 on July 11, 2026.

angles.name: Goth Icon Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 69th Birthday to the legendary Peter Murphy of Bauhaus on July 11th! What's your favourite track from the 'Godfather of Goth'?

angles.name: Bauhaus Frontman
angles.copy: On July 11th, we're wishing a very happy 69th birthday to Peter Murphy! His influence on music is undeniable.

moments.title: Lil' Kim Turns 51
moments.blurb: Grammy-winning rapper Lil' Kim celebrates her 51st birthday on July 11, 2026.

angles.name: Queen Bee Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 51st Birthday to the one and only Queen Bee, Lil' Kim, on July 11th! What's your go-to Lil' Kim anthem?

angles.name: Hip Hop Icon
angles.copy: On July 11th, we're celebrating the 51st birthday of hip-hop trailblazer Lil' Kim! Her impact on music and fashion is huge.

moments.title: Liz Mitchell of Boney M. Turns 74
moments.blurb: Liz Mitchell, the lead singer of the iconic disco group Boney M., celebrates her 74th birthday on July 12, 2026.

angles.name: Boney M. Legend
angles.copy: Happy 74th Birthday to Liz Mitchell, the voice of Boney M., on July 12th! What's your favourite Boney M. hit?

angles.name: Disco Diva
angles.copy: On July 12th, we're celebrating the 74th birthday of disco queen Liz Mitchell! Her vocals defined an era.

moments.title: UB40's Alan Campbell Turns 63
moments.blurb: Alan Campbell, a long-standing member of the reggae band UB40, celebrates his 63rd birthday on July 12, 2026.

angles.name: Reggae Royalty
angles.copy: Happy 63rd Birthday to Alan Campbell of UB40 on July 12th! What's your favourite UB40 track to chill out to?

angles.name: Red Red Wine Day
angles.copy: On July 12th, we're raising a glass to Alan Campbell of UB40 for his 63rd birthday! Cheers to the reggae legends!

moments.title: Dream Theater's John Petrucci Turns 59
moments.blurb: Renowned guitarist John Petrucci of the progressive metal band Dream Theater celebrates his 59th birthday on July 12, 2026.

angles.name: Guitar God Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 59th Birthday to the incredible John Petrucci of Dream Theater on July 12th! What's your favourite Petrucci guitar solo?

angles.name: Prog Rock Master
angles.copy: On July 12th, we're celebrating the 59th birthday of Dream Theater's guitar maestro, John Petrucci. A true titan of progressive rock!

moments.title: The Open Championship Practice Rounds Begin
moments.blurb: Practice rounds for the 154th Open Championship officially begin on July 12th at Royal Birkdale Golf Club in Southport, leading up to the main tournament from July 16th-19th.

angles.name: Golf's Greatest Returns
angles.copy: The countdown is on! Practice rounds for The 154th Open Championship kick off this Sunday, July 12th, at Royal Birkdale. Golf's biggest names are arriving!

angles.name: Royal Birkdale Beckons
angles.copy: This Sunday, July 12th, Royal Birkdale welcomes golfers for practice ahead of The Open Championship. Who's going to be the Champion Golfer of the Year?

moments.title: Little House on the Prairie Reboot on Netflix
moments.blurb: A new adaptation of 'Little House on the Prairie', based on Laura Ingalls Wilder's classic books, premieres on Netflix on July 9th.

angles.name: Prairie Time
angles.copy: Get ready for a trip back in time! The 'Little House on the Prairie' reboot lands on Netflix this Thursday, July 9th. Will you be tuning in?

angles.name: Family Drama
angles.copy: A beloved classic gets a fresh spin! The new 'Little House on the Prairie' series premieres on Netflix on July 9th, promising sweeping landscapes and timeless family stories.

moments.title: Love is Blind: UK - After the Altar Season 2 on Netflix
moments.blurb: The second season of 'Love is Blind: UK – After the Altar' premieres globally on Netflix on Sunday, July 12th, catching up with the cast after their pod experience.

angles.name: Love is Blind Catch-Up
angles.copy: Did you follow their journey? 'Love is Blind: UK – After the Altar' Season 2 drops on Netflix this Sunday, July 12th! Get ready for the drama.

angles.name: Reality TV Fix
angles.copy: Your reality TV fix is coming! 'Love is Blind: UK – After the Altar' Season 2 premieres on Netflix this Sunday. Who are you hoping is still together?

moments.title: Pride in London 2026
moments.blurb: London hosts its annual Pride celebration today, July 4th, transforming the capital into a vibrant display of LGBTQIA+ visibility, community, and equality.

angles.name: London Pride Celebration
angles.copy: Happy Pride in London! The capital is bursting with colour and celebration today. Join in the joy, visibility, and unity!

angles.name: Celebrate Diversity
angles.copy: Today marks Pride in London 2026! A vibrant celebration of the LGBTQIA+ community, spreading messages of love and equality across the city.
